content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年05月27日 周三
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [study8677/awesome-architecture](https://github.com/study8677/awesome-architecture)
   🗺️ Think like a software architect, not just a coder — 21 architecture maps (inc | ⭐303
2. [bryanyzhu/agentic-ai-system-course](https://github.com/bryanyzhu/agentic-ai-system-course)
   Use agent to learn agent - A skeleton course on how to design, build, and operat | ⭐244
3. [realrossmanngroup/no_ai_slop_writing_rules](https://github.com/realrossmanngroup/no_ai_slop_writing_rules)
   Claude Code reference: write in Louis Rossmann's voice, never like AI slop. Port | ⭐211
4. [mikaeldengale-cloud/Deepseek-v4-Pro-App](https://github.com/mikaeldengale-cloud/Deepseek-v4-Pro-App)
   deepseek v4 flash pro chat  api  app windows 11 desktop client github open sourc | ⭐184
5. [UditAkhourii/adhd](https://github.com/UditAkhourii/adhd)
   ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Cla | ⭐182
6. [NabilAziz99/agent-runtime](https://github.com/NabilAziz99/agent-runtime)
   Python port of Claude Code's agent-runtime architecture, on LangChain | ⭐118
7. [bandyah/uni-mm-trainer](https://github.com/bandyah/uni-mm-trainer)
   A small library for training multimodal LLMs combining text, vision, and audio | ⭐111
8. [okturro/asr-rescore-bench](https://github.com/okturro/asr-rescore-bench)
   Benchmark for LLM-based ASR n-best rescoring (ngram, neural-LM, MLM-PLL, LLM-pro | ⭐109

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
